nasb.text: ordering his accusers to come before you.] By examining him yourself concerning all these matters you will be able to ascertain the things of which we accuse him.”

esv.text: By examining him yourself you will be able to find out from him about everything of which we accuse him.”

cnv.text: 你親自審問之後，就必清楚知道我們告他的一切事了。”

ccb.text: 并命令告他的人到大人这里来。大人亲自审问他，就会知道我们告他的事了。”

csbs.text: 您亲自审问他，就能了解我们控告他的这一切事了。”
